base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_garlic — a pickup_item from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Garlic — drop on ground. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Garlic — drop on ground; summons merchant at graves. Sheet humor annotation: 'Garlic... good for all your vampire, common cold, and nonspicy food ridding needs...'
